title: Mellow Sweet Kenyan Sweet Potato Bake
description: A sweet and velvety Kenyan dish featuring garlic, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and FODMAP-friendly. This bake is made with sweet potatoes, garlic, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced sweet potatoes with olive oil, salt, black pepper, paprika, cumin, and coriander until they are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, mix the minced garlic with a pinch of salt.
Add the garlic mixture to the sweet potatoes and toss until the garlic is evenly distributed.
Transfer the sweet potato mixture to a baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 45 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the Mellow Sweet Kenyan Sweet Potato Bake hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
